items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, UnitedHealth Group (UNH) stood at $347.75, denoting a +2.75% move from the preceding trading day.

items.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Higher After Trump Davos News; Johnson & Johnson Slides (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes rose Wednesday after sinking a day earlier, with some recovery arriving after President Donald Trump's rule-out of U.S. military force to pursue Greenland.

items.title: UnitedHealth CEO vows to rebate Obamacare profits to customers
items.description: UnitedHealth Group, which provides insurance to about 1 million Affordable Care Act customers, will rebate 2026 profits to these customers.

items.title: Dear UnitedHealth Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for January 27
items.description: UnitedHealth investors can look forward to Jan. 27, when the company will report its Q4 results.

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The Dow Industrials jumped nearly 590 points Wednesday after President Trump called off new tariffs on Europe.
